title: pilosella collina subsp. znoymensis
intro: Pilosella collina subsp. znoymensis, also known as a subspecies of the knapweed plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Pilosella collina subsp. znoymensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
